creator: luked@pobox.com
text:
Please update x11-toolkits/irrlicht to version 1.4.1.
	This is primarily a bugfix release.

Fix: 

I am not the maintainer, but I have attempted to upgrade the port myself.
	You can see the contents of my /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/irrlicht at
	http://lukas.is-a-geek.org/lukas/freebsd/irrlicht/

	I updated the Makefile, created a new checksum, and adjusted the existing patches to fit the 1.4.1 code.
	I've done only minimal testing, but this seems to work for me.
	I hope this saves the maintainer some time.  Thank you.
